title: Meeting Rooms II
prompt:
Given a list of meeting time intervals `intervals` (each `[start, end]`), find the **minimum number of conference rooms** required so no two overlapping meetings share a room.

**Example**: `min_meeting_rooms([[0,30],[5,10],[15,20]])` → `2`
hint_notes: Sort by start time; use a min-heap of end times to track rooms currently in use. If the earliest-ending room frees up before (or exactly when) the next meeting starts, reuse it instead of opening a new room. Tag: interval-heap-reuse.
